testcase.name: test_create_invoice_without_customer

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 422 for missing customer_id, got 403 assert 403 == 422 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_invoices_crud.py:485: in test_create_invoice_without_customer assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 for missing customer_id, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 422 for missing customer_id, got 403 E assert 403 == 422 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
